parameters.query:
=SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, Engagement_Status__c, CreatedDate
FROM Opportunity
WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'Follow Up (21)'
AND IsClosed = false
ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC
LIMIT 100

nodes.name: Call W11 - Adjust Task Due Date

additionalFields.description:
={{ 'Action: ' + $json.taskAction + '

Guidelines: ' + $json.taskGuidelines + '

Opportunity: ' + $json.opportunityName + '
Sequence Step: ' + $json.stepKey + '
Workflow: W14O - Opportunity 21-Day Follow Up Task Sequence' }}
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.taskSubject }}
